speaker: Command
message: Unit Phi here Command. Report current fire conditions and spread direction. Listening

speaker: Unit Phi
message: Command here Unit Phi. Active wildfire in the forested area, multiple trees involved, heavy smoke moving across the clearing. Listening

speaker: Command
message: Unit Phi here Command. Confirm any exposures or access concerns near the fire front. Listening

speaker: Unit Phi
message: Command here Unit Phi. There appears to be a house beyond the tree line, but occupancy is not confirmed. Fire is moving in that direction through the trees. Listening

speaker: Command
message: Unit Phi here Command. Received. Prioritize exposure assessment from a safe position and confirm if any persons are visible near that house. Listening

speaker: Unit Phi
message: Command here Unit Phi. Negative visual confirmation of persons at this time. Smoke is limiting visibility near the house and access path. Listening
